title: Concept Sets
description: Concept Sets are reusable collections of standardised clinical vocabulary terms drawn from the OMOP CDM vocabulary. They are used throughout the platform to define conditions, drugs, procedures, measurements, and other clinical entities within cohort definitions and analyses.
tips: Use the Vocabulary Browser to explore concept hierarchies and identify all relevant descendant codes before finalising a concept set.
Enable the 'Include Descendants' flag to capture all child concepts in a hierarchy without manually enumerating each code.
Use the Mapping Assistant to identify source codes that map to your target standard concepts, ensuring complete coverage.
Document the clinical rationale for included and excluded concepts to facilitate peer review and reuse.
Periodically review concept sets against new vocabulary releases to incorporate updated or deprecated codes.
